Last 10 overall accuracy = 40% (below 45% threshold — performance deterioration flag). The recent 10 include multiple near-certainty entries (0.08-0.09 range cheap-side, 0.985 near-cert) and some contested wins, suggesting mixed methodology. Iran_ME at 64% on 253 trades is solid and the primary signal source. The Trump_US and Russia_UKR blind spots are unusually severe and must be explicitly excluded from any signal use. Confidence LOW: borderline LEGENDARY status + geo_trades discrepancy + recent performance deterioration flag create too many uncertainties for MEDIUM confidence.
